nasb.text: If, however, you are fulfilling the royal law according to the Scripture, “You shall love your neighbor as yourself,” you are doing well.

esv.text: If you really fulfill the royal law according to the Scripture, “You shall love your neighbor as yourself,” you are doing well.

cnv.text: 你們若照著聖經所說“要愛人如己”這話，去完成這至尊的律法，你們就作對了。

ccb.text: 如果你们能切实行出圣经中“要爱邻如己”这条至尊的律法，就好了。

csbs.text: 不过，你们如果照着经上那条至尊的律法“要爱邻如己”完全实行，你们就做得很好了。
